introSection: Wonder Woman Flight of Courage is a steel single rail roller coaster at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA. It is a Raptor Track installation from Rocky Mountain Construction.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In April 2020, Six Flags Magic Mountain submitted plans for a new roller coaster to Los Angeles County. By August 2021, work on the foundations had started and track had arrived onsite. Wonder Woman Flight of Courage was announced on October 21, 2021. It would reuse the former Green Lantern: First Flight station.

Vertical construction of the attraction began in February 2022.

The highest point of the ride was topped off in June 2022.

Wonder Woman Flight of Courage opened on July 16, 2022.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride's layout is similar to that of Jersey Devil Coaster at Six Flags Great Adventure, though Wonder Woman Flight of Courage has a different ending with an additional over-banked curve, making it the longest Raptor Track installation.

fullText:
Wonder Woman Flight of Courage is a steel single rail roller coaster at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA. It is a Raptor Track installation from Rocky Mountain Construction.

In April 2020, Six Flags Magic Mountain submitted plans for a new roller coaster to Los Angeles County. By August 2021, work on the foundations had started and track had arrived onsite. Wonder Woman Flight of Courage was announced on October 21, 2021. It would reuse the former Green Lantern: First Flight station.

Vertical construction of the attraction began in February 2022.

The highest point of the ride was topped off in June 2022.

Wonder Woman Flight of Courage opened on July 16, 2022.

The ride's layout is similar to that of Jersey Devil Coaster at Six Flags Great Adventure, though Wonder Woman Flight of Courage has a different ending with an additional over-banked curve, making it the longest Raptor Track installation.
